build_system: Expo CLI + npm scripts. Android builds via Gradle. No Docker.
test_framework: Static: ESLint + TypeScript. E2E: Playwright against a fake OpenCode server. No unit test suite.
build_command: npm run lint && npm run typecheck
verification_instructions: 1. npm run lint  2. npm run typecheck  3. Verify tab labels in _layout.tsx are renamed correctly
environment_constraints: No Android emulator or Termux available in sandbox. Validation is limited to static checks (lint, typecheck). expo-intent-launcher and expo-linking already in dependencies.
contribution_requirements: Follow AGENTS.md layer rules: providers own domain state, lib owns platform helpers, components own UI, app owns thin routing. New platform integration helpers go in lib/.
key_patterns: Settings sections are extracted components in components/settings/. Bellows client in lib/bellows/client.ts. Provider state in providers/. Tab layout in app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx. Colors in constants/theme.ts.
directory_structure: app/(tabs)/ - tab screens and layout. components/ - UI components. lib/ - protocol/platform helpers. providers/ - state providers. constants/ - theme/config. tests/ - e2e and fake server.
